identity.title: Summer Drip
identity.styleSentence: A slow-syrupy chopped & screwed Southern rap track with heavy sub-bass, rattling hi-hats, and a melodic raspy hook, set at a relaxed 117 BPM with a late-night computer lab vibe and luxury tech flex anthem energy.
identity.vocalStyle: Clean, multi-rapper crew cypher with female lead energy, raspy melodic hook, and southern twangs

cover.description: The cover features a vibrant beach sunset scene with women in bikinis lounging and standing on the shore, surrounded by summer-themed items like sunglasses, a boombox, and a drink cup. Bold purple and gold dripping text for "Summer Drip (Her Cut)" dominates the center against a warm orange sky.
cover.artStyle: Vibrant pop art with neon drips and retro summer aesthetics

lyrics.text:
Title: Summer Drip (Her Cut)
[Style] Chopped & screwed dirty south rap, hard booming bass, slow syrupy tempo, rattling hi-hats, pitched-down vocal chops, clean multi-rapper crew cypher with female lead energy, raspy melodic hook, southern twangs, flirtatious summer flex from her point of view, confident and teasing, loyal but tempted, sexy but frustrated, no profanity. Aim for 4:20 with slow pacing, hook tails, chopped ad-libs, bass drops, and fade outro.
[Intro] Heat turned up. Every stare feel loud. Slow it down.
[Ad-Libs] Summer. Drip. Hips. Flip. Walk mean.
[Hook] I feel this sundress glow under the day light, hips swing slow, moving smooth in the midnight. Heart stay cold but my stride got flame, every little step got a high-class game. Smile so sweet with the timing just right, brown skin shine with the streetlamp light. Perfume thick, got ‘em stuck in a bind, all these hungry eyes got ‘em losing they mind.
[Verse 1 - Smooth Southern Flow] Walked in the spot, had to savor my tone. Whole room staring like a queen on a throne. Dance floor quiet but the glances loud, every lens locked in, every whisper so proud. Long legs, soft hands, curves on the rise, tiny little waist doing work oversized. Gloss game smooth, neckline sitting real neat, gold chain resting while my laugh so sweet. This dress fit tight, little slit on the side, moving through the crowd with my natural pride. DM count high but I’m trying stay clean, loyal to my peace, steady guard my dream.
[Hook - Chopped] I feel this sundress glow under the day light, hips swing slow in the midnight. Heart stay cold but my stride got flame, every little step got a high-class game.
[Verse 2 - Gravelly Dirty South Flow] Hold up, let me speak on my girls for a second, best friend bad, that’s a whole lot of pressure. One got curls that could make time freeze, the other walk by and the streets say please. You like long hair? I like strong mind better, side eye deadly like a hand-penned letter. Bold red lip make the whole block slow, but ring on her hand mean we keep that closed. Tan lines sharp from the beach last night, crop tops sitting with the waistlines laid. Denim shorts fitted, sun caught that crease, we summertime fine but we move with peace.
[Bridge - Crew Argument] [Rapper 3] Who that in the yellow? [Rapper 1] That glow stay bright, little halo mellow. [Rapper 2] One in the shades got they heartbeat wide. [Rapper 4] One in the jeans got the whole block tied. [Taken Girl] I got vows on paper but I still won’t slide. [Whole Crew] Stand ground.
[Female Tease Rapper] My phone stay lit, little hearts in a line, whole feed on me when I step outside. Sun hit skin, that’s a natural light, walk so smooth I could glide through the night. Every time I pass, all the heads do a spin, they checking that ring but they still lean in. You talk all day about loyal and pure, but you breathe real hard when I walk through the door.
[Rapper 2] You post fly pics with a sly little sign.
[Rapper 1] Pretty little look but you guard that line.
[Female Tease Rapper] I just like the tease, I don’t cross that line.
[Whole Crew] Still got ‘em pressed every time.
[Verse 3 - Fast Crew Rapper] Work fit on point looking too on beat, gym set tight with the steady quad heat. Brunch crew fresh with the selfies on time, club girls ready got the dance floor prime. Beach trip hit with the sundress breeze, rooftop bar with the long hair free. Old crush text with a late-night theme, new like popping in the story stream. Partner at home and they still top tier, but the DMs wild when the summer get near. I stay locked in, yeah I play that strong, but the thoughts run laps like a long song.
[Hook - Bigger, Slower] I feel this sundress glow under the day light, hips swing slow in the midnight. Heart stay cold but my stride got flame, every little step got a high-class game. Smile so sweet with the timing just right, brown skin shine with the streetlamp light. Perfume thick, got ‘em stuck in a bind, all these hungry eyes got ‘em losing they mind.
[Verse 4 - Deep Slow Flex] Street so hot but the breeze feel balanced, skirt catch wind like a natural talent. Two-piece low, little wrap tied high, sun hit skin while the clouds roll by. Patio packed, every chair calibrated, playlist loud, whole mood feel nice. Crosswalk flashing, little hips keep swaying, phones in the air but the eyes stay praying. Mind doing pushups, guard keep pace, trying stay loyal in this fine-filled space.
[Breakdown] Dress game too high. Leg line still fly. Waistline so fine. Power on line.
[Taken Girl] Can somebody chill out all this thirst, uh?
[Whole Crew] Hold that crown.
[Female Tease Rapper] I’ll just walk by.
[Whole Crew] Of course you will.
[Outro] Summer drip on the late-night ave, fit so wild got ‘em doing the math. Promise so strong, let the whole thing ride, walking past pressure with my crew outside. Testing my grace. Clear mind. Still yours. Full send. Slow it down. Summer drip.

analysis.summary: A confident and playful celebration of summer nights, self-assurance, and luxury, wrapped in a slow, chopped-and-screwed Southern Hip-Hop track that blends sultry vibes with tech-inspired bragging and smooth movements.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing neon sign reflecting off a sleek black car, casting a long shadow under the moonlight.
A woman in a flowing dress swaying slowly under a flickering streetlamp, her silhouette dancing with the wind.
A golden sun peeking through the trees, casting dappled light on a woman walking barefoot through a grassy field.
A still lake reflecting a calm, starry night sky, with a lone figure standing at the water's edge.
A roaring fire in a darkened room, with flickering shadows dancing on the walls as someone stands at its center.
A woman in an elegant evening gown standing confidently in front of a mirror, her reflection glowing with self-assurance.
A clock face with glowing hands, surrounded by floating notes and a dancer mid-twirl, perfectly in sync with the beat.
A dark, rich perfume bottle resting on a velvet table, its scent lingering in the air as a candle flickers nearby.
A peaceful lake at dawn, with a single leaf floating on the surface and a calm, meditative figure sitting on the shore.
A woman in a flowing sundress walking through a summer night under the glow of streetlights, her silhouette glowing softly in the heat.
A woman's skin glowing under the summer sun, her silhouette lit from behind by the light of a streetlamp.
A woman with a slow, knowing smile, her eyes locked on someone across the room, the light catching the curve of her lips.
A woman's skin glowing under the summer sun, the light catching the curve of her arms and shoulders.
A woman walking through a crowded room, the scent of her perfume lingering in the air, drawing people toward her.
A woman in a tight-fitting summer dress, the fabric catching the light as she moves through the crowd.
A woman walking with a slow, deliberate gait, the slit on the side of her dress revealing just enough to draw attention.
A woman standing with her hands on her hips, a look of quiet determination on her face as she holds a piece of paper in her hand.
A woman walking with a slow, deliberate gait, her thighs visible beneath the hem of her dress, drawing eyes as she moves.
A woman with a curvy figure walking through a dimly lit room, the light catching the curve of her hips and waist.
A woman wearing a gold chain around her neck, the light catching the links as she moves through the crowd.
A woman standing in the middle of a hot summer night, the heat around her creating a magnetic pull that draws people in.
A woman turning her head slightly, a slow glance that captures the attention of everyone in the room.
A woman walking with a slow, smooth glide, her movements effortless and full of grace.

meaning.story: The song is a sultry, confident ode to summer nights and the allure of a woman who commands attention with her presence, style, and self-assurance. Beneath the playful and teasing surface lies a tension between loyalty and temptation, as she navigates the pull of desire while maintaining control and pride in her choices.

sections.name: Intro
sections.interpretation: A slow, sultry setup that introduces the heat and intensity of the summer night.
sections.keyLine: Heat turned up. Every stare feel loud.

sections.name: Ad-Libs
sections.interpretation: Playful, teasing phrases that highlight the summer vibe and the woman's confident walk.
sections.keyLine: Summer. Drip. Hips. Flip. Walk mean.

sections.name: Hook
sections.interpretation: A sultry, confident declaration of her presence and allure under the summer light.
sections.keyLine: Heart stay cold but my stride got flame.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.interpretation: A confident portrayal of her commanding presence and elegance in a social setting.
sections.keyLine: This dress fit tight, little slit on the side, moving through the crowd with my natural pride.

sections.name: Hook - Chopped
sections.interpretation: A slower, more deliberate version of the hook emphasizing her controlled, high-class movement.
sections.keyLine: Every little step got a high-class game.

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.interpretation: A celebration of her friends and the power of their presence, highlighting strength and allure.
sections.keyLine: Bold red lip make the whole block slow.

sections.name: Bridge - Crew Argument
sections.interpretation: A dynamic exchange that reinforces loyalty, pride, and the power of the group.
sections.keyLine: I got vows on paper but I still won’t slide.

sections.name: Female Tease Rapper
sections.interpretation: A playful and confident tease that highlights her allure and the effect she has on others.
sections.keyLine: You talk all day about loyal and pure, but you breathe real hard when I walk through the door.

sections.name: Verse 3 - Fast Crew Rapper
sections.interpretation: A fast-paced reflection on her life, style, and the balance between commitment and temptation.
sections.keyLine: Partner at home and they still top tier, but the DMs wild when the summer get near.

sections.name: Hook - Bigger, Slower
sections.interpretation: A more expansive and slower version of the hook, emphasizing her confidence and allure.
sections.keyLine: Perfume thick, got ‘em stuck in a bind.

sections.name: Verse 4 - Deep Slow Flex
sections.interpretation: A slow, deliberate flex on her presence, style, and ability to command attention.
sections.keyLine: Sun hit skin while the clouds roll by.

sections.name: Breakdown
sections.interpretation: A concise, powerful summary of her allure and the impact she has on others.
sections.keyLine: Dress game too high. Leg line still fly.

sections.name: Outro
sections.interpretation: A confident, slow fade-out that leaves the listener with the lingering presence of summer and her allure.
sections.keyLine: Summer drip on the late-night ave.

keyLines: I feel this sundress glow under the day light, hips swing slow, moving smooth in the midnight.
Heart stay cold but my stride got flame, every little step got a high-class game.
Smile so sweet with the timing just right, brown skin shine with the streetlamp light.
Perfume thick, got ‘em stuck in a bind, all these hungry eyes got ‘em losing they mind.
This dress fit tight, little slit on the side, moving through the crowd with my natural pride.
I got vows on paper but I still won’t slide.
